hero.title: You're running a community
hero.subtitle: Your community data disappears after every event. Luhive captures it automatically, building member history, engagement data, and sponsor proof

about.title: The Future of Community Management
about.description: We're building the ultimate community platform for verified organizations. Starting in Azerbaijan, scaling globally.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.description: Communities today are fragmented. Event management happens on Google Forms. Announcements are scattered across Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord. Feedback gets lost in the noise.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.description: Luhive brings everything together — events, communication, feedback, and community engagement — all in one beautifully designed platform.

whoWeServe.title: Who We Serve
whoWeServe.description: Verified communities that want real connections and zero chaos. From tech communities to educational organizations.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Starting in Azerbaijan, scaling globally. We're building a platform that empowers communities worldwide to connect, engage, and thrive together. Our mission is to break down barriers, foster meaningful connections, and create spaces where every community can flourish—no matter where they are.

features.title: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't

unifiedEvents.title: Unified Event Management
unifiedEvents.description: Create, manage, and track events effortlessly. No more Google Forms. Just one powerful system that works.

centralizedComm.title: Centralized Communication
centralizedComm.description: Say goodbye to scattered chats. All your community conversations, announcements, and updates in one place.

smartFeedback.title: Smart Feedback System
smartFeedback.description: Collect, organize, and act on community feedback. Never lose a suggestion or request again.

verified.title: Verified Communities
verified.description: Join authentic, verified communities. Build trust and credibility with official community badges.

analytics.title: Analytics & Insights
analytics.description: Understand your community better with powerful analytics. Track engagement, growth, and member activity.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.description: Your community's data is safe with us. Enterprise-grade security meets user-friendly design.

memberMemory.title: Member Memory
memberMemory.description: Every registration, every attendance, every return — saved automatically. Your member list grows itself.

eventIntelligence.title: Event Intelligence
eventIntelligence.description: See which events actually worked, who showed up, and who keeps coming back. No spreadsheet needed.

visual.title: Recent Events
visual.aiSuggestion: Your AI hackathons outperform other formats by 40%. Consider running more.

reachTheRightPeople.title: Reach the Right People
reachTheRightPeople.description: Send announcements to your full community or filter by interest or attendance. No more blasting everyone with everything.

communityMemory.title: Community Memory
communityMemory.description: New co-organizer joins and sees everything from day one. You step back and nothing disappears.

partners.subtitle: Trusted by communities around the world

contact.title: Be Part of the Future
contact.description: Have questions? Want to learn more about Luhive? We'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: Building the future of community management.

cta.title: Create your own community
cta.description: Build the Digital Network of you to scale your connections & reach, infinitely.

benefit1.title: Centralized Power
benefit1.description: Manage members, analytics, communication, and growth from a single dashboard. End tool juggling now.

benefit2.title: Effortless Workflow
benefit2.description: Stop feeling drained by admin. Spend less time managing and more time connecting.

benefit3.title: Connected & Growing
benefit3.description: Integration with major platforms drives cross‑platform discovery. Get seen everywhere.

digital-community-pillars.title: The 4 Pillars of a Digital Community
digital-community-pillars.subtitle: It's not about the platform; it's about the people. Here's the framework you need to make it work.

digital-belonging.title: Philosophy of Digital Belonging
digital-belonging.subtitle: Why are we more connected than ever, yet still feel isolated? Exploring the psychology of belonging online.

measure-connection.title: How to Measure Connection
measure-connection.subtitle: If engagement is the goal, what metrics truly matter? We introduce the "Trust Score" and more.

moderation-right-way.title: Moderation, Done The Right Way
moderation-right-way.subtitle: Moderation isn't a reaction; it's a design feature. Learn how to craft clear, proactive policies.

what-is-luhive.question: What is Luhive?
what-is-luhive.answer: Luhive is the all-in-one "Operating System" built specifically for community managers and organizers. We eliminate the scattered tools by giving you a unified hub to manage, analyze, and scale your community faster than ever before.

who-is-luhive-built-for.question: Who is Luhive built for?
who-is-luhive-built-for.answer: We are focused on Community Admins and Organizers. If you manage an organization, a group, or a community, Luhive is your essential tool for making management easy and effective.

what-problem-does-luhive-solve.question: What problem does Luhive solve?
what-problem-does-luhive-solve.answer: We solve the fragmented ecosystem problem. Instead of using 4-5 different external tools for forms, events, announcements, and tracking, you use one, single platform. This cuts down on time waste and complexity. Luhive praises simplicity

how-does-luhive-provide-deep-analytics.question: How does Luhive provide "Deep Analytics"?
how-does-luhive-provide-deep-analytics.answer: Our platform tracks member activity history, event attendance, and engagement. It's a Member CRM with rich data. We give you the actionable intelligence needed to understand what works, who your most active members are, and how to improve your next event with our AI solutions.
